code:
import io
import string

fn is_ws(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Bool
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(b)
    b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
  when None
    false
  end
end

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let n = string.len(line)
mut i = 0
mut sum = 0
mut stopped = false

while i < n and not stopped
  while i < n and is_ws(line, i)
    i = i + 1
  end
  if i >= n
    stopped = true
  else
    mut j = i
    while j < n and not is_ws(line, j)
      j = j + 1
    end
    let tok = string.substring(line, i, j)
    match string.parse_int(tok)
    when Some(v)
      if v < 0
        stopped = true
      else
        sum = sum + v
        i = j
      end
    when None
      stopped = true
    end
  end
end

println("partial=#{sum}")
